insights.tactical_flaw: Tentative early against sharp inswing from around the wicket.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mitchell Starc with a brand new ball targeting the front pad.

fielding.reason: Stationed specifically for the uncontrolled hook shot.
In position for the inside edge onto the pads.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Allowed a crucial boundary, breaking KKR's stranglehold.

insights.tactical_flaw: Vulnerable to incoming deliveries that target the stumps early on.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mayank Yadav to swing the ball into the pads aiming for LBW.

insights.tactical_flaw: Over-cautious against spin in the middle overs.
insights.optimal_tactic: Harpreet Brar to bowl through overs 7-11 to build dot ball pressure.

fielding.reason: To catch the flick shot if the inswinger is slightly misdirected.
To catch the edge when he attempts a defensive prod.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Dropped a tough edge; Shashank finished the game.

insights.tactical_flaw: Tied down by mystery spin turning back into him.
insights.optimal_tactic: Kuldeep Yadav to bowl the googly continuously on middle and leg.

insights.tactical_flaw: Strong down the ground but struggles to generate power on wide yorkers.
insights.optimal_tactic: T. Natarajan to commit fully to the wide yorker line at the death.

fielding.reason: To cut off the flick when he fails to read the googly.
To cover the slice when he reaches for wide deliveries.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: A costly drop in the death overs; Klaasen capitalized heavily.

insights.tactical_flaw: Looks to clear the leg side but struggles against genuine pace moving away.
insights.optimal_tactic: Spencer Johnson to angle the ball across the left-hander.

insights.tactical_flaw: Bogged down by wide pace off the ball.
insights.optimal_tactic: Jasprit Bumrah to bowl wide, dipping slower balls.

fielding.reason: To catch the outside edge from the away-angling delivery.
To defend against the slap shot over the off-side.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Dropped the GT captain, leading to a massive opening partnership.

insights.tactical_flaw: Dominates pace but struggles with tight spin.
insights.optimal_tactic: Ravindra Jadeja to bowl early to restrict boundary options.

insights.tactical_flaw: Takes time against mystery spin in the middle overs.
insights.optimal_tactic: Sunil Narine to bowl flat and straight.

fielding.reason: To cut off the sweeps he uses to counter spin.
To catch the mistimed loft.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Allowed an easy boundary that released early pressure.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles against slow off-cutters away from his hitting arc.
insights.optimal_tactic: Andre Russell to bowl wide, dipping slower balls.

insights.tactical_flaw: Can be starved of strike by firing wide yorkers past the tramline.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mohammed Siraj to commit fully to the wide yorker.

fielding.reason: To guard the boundary on the off-side slap.
To cut off boundaries when he manages to slice the wide yorker.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Dropped a massive chance; Russell finished the game.

insights.tactical_flaw: Tentative against sharp inswing from over the wicket.
insights.optimal_tactic: Arshdeep Singh to bowl full targeting the pads.

insights.tactical_flaw: Excellent at sweeping pace, but struggles with high-pace bouncers.
insights.optimal_tactic: Avesh Khan must bowl aggressive bouncers.

fielding.reason: For the inside edge onto the pads.
Pushed back to catch the top edge from the bouncer.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Failed to collect a thick edge, extending the PBKS innings.

insights.tactical_flaw: Strong off the pads but struggles to drive cleanly through the off-side against spin.
insights.optimal_tactic: Rashid Khan to bowl darting deliveries wide of the off-stump.

insights.tactical_flaw: Pre-meditates the sweep against spin.
insights.optimal_tactic: Kuldeep Yadav to bowl quick and flat on the stumps. Do not give the ball air.

fielding.reason: To stop the drive and build dot ball pressure.
To limit the damage if he connects with the sweep.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Pant escaped early and anchored the chase.

insights.tactical_flaw: Plants his front foot early. Vulnerable to fast, full deliveries swinging into the pads.
insights.optimal_tactic: Bhuvneshwar Kumar to bowl full and fast aiming for the base of middle stump.

insights.tactical_flaw: Susceptible to inswinging yorkers targeting the pads.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mayank Yadav to bowl full and search for swing immediately.

fielding.reason: Brought inside the ring to restrict his straight drives.
For the inside edge or leg glance when digging out the yorker.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Dropped a sharp edge; Sharma took the game away.

insights.tactical_flaw: Can be drawn into false drives by late outswing.
insights.optimal_tactic: Trent Boult to bowl the 4th stump line searching for the outside edge.

insights.tactical_flaw: High intent leads to early risks against spin.
insights.optimal_tactic: Ravindra Jadeja to toss it up wide of off-stump.

fielding.reason: Crucial for catching the nick from the driving length.
Bait for the aggressive lofted drive.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Gave away an easy boundary in the powerplay.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles to generate power on short, slow bouncers.
insights.optimal_tactic: Khaleel Ahmed to use off-cutters dug short.

insights.tactical_flaw: Loses balance reaching for wide yorkers.
insights.optimal_tactic: Jasprit Bumrah to strictly target the wide guideline.

fielding.reason: To catch the mistimed pull.
Protects the boundary when he throws his bat.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Allowed DC to finish strong.

insights.tactical_flaw: Slashes hard at wide pace-off deliveries.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mohsin Khan to bowl wide slower bouncers.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles to generate power against spin turning away.
insights.optimal_tactic: Rashid Khan to bowl leg-breaks wide outside off.

fielding.reason: To catch the slice.
To restrict the drive.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Pooran capitalised to hit an extra 25 runs.

insights.tactical_flaw: Impatient against high-quality wrist spin.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mayank Markande to toss it up wide outside off.

insights.tactical_flaw: Bogged down by wide, slow bouncers.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mohammed Siraj to bowl slow and wide.

fielding.reason: For a mistimed slog sweep.
For the sliced shot.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Turned a dot ball into a boundary.

insights.tactical_flaw: Highly aggressive but impatient against spin.
insights.optimal_tactic: Axar Patel to toss it up wide outside off and invite the big slog.

insights.tactical_flaw: Edges deliveries angling across at high pace.
insights.optimal_tactic: Kagiso Rabada to bowl back of a length angling across.

fielding.reason: Prime catching location for a mistimed slog sweep.
For flying outside edges.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Pant took full advantage in the death overs.

insights.tactical_flaw: Vulnerable to incoming deliveries early.
insights.optimal_tactic: Deepak Chahar to swing the ball into the pads aiming for LBW.

insights.tactical_flaw: Freezes against sharp bouncers directed at his badge.

fielding.reason: To catch the flick shot.
For the top edge hook.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Crucial drop in the powerplay.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles with high-pace bouncers.
insights.optimal_tactic: Harshit Rana to bowl aggressive bouncers.

insights.tactical_flaw: Slashes hard at wide yorkers.
insights.optimal_tactic: T. Natarajan to bowl wide yorkers out of his arc.

fielding.reason: For the top edge.
Prime catching spot.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Allowed an easy boundary.

insights.tactical_flaw: Can be tied down by consistent wide, full lines.
insights.optimal_tactic: Jasprit Bumrah to pack the off-side and bowl wide yorkers.

insights.tactical_flaw: Frustrated by boundary riders cutting off singles.

fielding.reason: Essential for catching the slice.
To aggressively cut off strike rotation.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Missed a crucial catch at the death.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles with express pace short-pitch bowling.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mohammed Siraj to bowl aggressive bouncers to push him back.

insights.tactical_flaw: Frustrated by left-arm spin sliding across him early.
insights.optimal_tactic: Krunal Pandya to bowl a tight off-stump line.

fielding.reason: Positioned for the mistimed pull.
To cut off the flick.

fielding_errors.tactical_impact: Allowed an opening stand of 80 runs.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles to dig out dipping yorkers at the death.
insights.optimal_tactic: Mohammed Siraj to strictly target the toes.

insights.tactical_flaw: Stationary against spin early; hits exclusively from the crease.

fielding.reason: To cut off the straight drive.
To cover the reverse sweep.

insights.tactical_flaw: Can be tucked up by fast pace angling into the ribcage.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles to force the pace against wide, slow off-cutters.

fielding.reason: Ready for the mistimed pull or fend off the ribs.

insights.tactical_flaw: Tentative against high-quality spin darted into the pads.
insights.optimal_tactic: Piyush Chawla to bowl flat and quick.

insights.tactical_flaw: Struggles against early swing moving away.
insights.optimal_tactic: Arshdeep Singh to pitch it up and look for the outside edge.

insights.tactical_flaw: Vulnerable to incoming deliveries targeting the stumps early.
